script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== zip metadata ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/kaye-teams-app.zip
echo '=== zip contents listing ==='
unzip -l /home/azureuser/kaye-teams-app.zip 2>&1
echo '=== manifest.json (full) ==='
unzip -p /home/azureuser/kaye-teams-app.zip manifest.json 2>&1
echo
echo '=== cross-check: kaye-bot service appId vs manifest botId ==='
KAYE_APP_ID=$(az bot show -g SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw -n OpenClaw-KayeAgent --query 'properties.msaAppId' -o tsv 2>/dev/null)
echo "OpenClaw-KayeAgent Azure botId: $KAYE_APP_ID"
MANIFEST_BOT=$(unzip -p /home/azureuser/kaye-teams-app.zip manifest.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print((d.get("bots") or [{}])[0].get("botId",""))')
echo "manifest.json bots[0].botId:  $MANIFEST_BOT"
if [ "$KAYE_APP_ID" = "$MANIFEST_BOT" ] && [ -n "$KAYE_APP_ID" ]; then
  echo 'MATCH: manifest points at the correct Kaye bot resource.'
else
  echo 'MISMATCH or empty: investigate before uploading.'
fi
echo
echo '=== compare manifest top-level IDs against Aixa template (to detect copy-paste) ==='
echo '--- Kaye manifest IDs ---'
unzip -p /home/azureuser/kaye-teams-app.zip manifest.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("id:",d.get("id")); print("packageName:",d.get("packageName")); print("name.short:",(d.get("name") or {}).get("short")); print("version:",d.get("version"))'
echo '--- Aixa manifest IDs (for comparison) ---'
cat /home/azureuser/aixa-teams-app/manifest.json | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print("id:",d.get("id")); print("packageName:",d.get("packageName")); print("name.short:",(d.get("name") or {}).get("short")); print("version:",d.get("version"))'
echo '===END==='
